product_updates.title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows
product_updates.content: The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.

product_updates.title: What happened at Nvidia GTC: NemoClaw, Robot Olaf, and a $1 trillion bet
product_updates.content: CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at Nvidia’s GTC conference this week in his signature leather jacket to deliver a two-and-a-half-hour keynote, projecting $1 trillion in AI chip sales through 2027, declaring that every company needs an “OpenClaw strategy,” and closing with a rambling Olaf robot th…

product_updates.title: Nvidia has an OpenClaw strategy. Do you?
product_updates.content: CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at Nvidia’s GTC conference this week in his signature leather jacket to deliver a two-and-a-half-hour keynote, projecting $1 trillion in AI chip sales through 2027, declaring that every company needs an “OpenClaw strategy,” and closing with a rambling Olaf robot th…

product_updates.title: WordPress.com now lets AI agents write and publish posts, and more
product_updates.content: New AI agents on WordPress.com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web.

product_updates.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
product_updates.content: Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.

product_updates.title: The best AI investment might be in energy tech
product_updates.content: Power has become one of the biggest bottlenecks in rolling out new AI data centers. That's creating an opening for investors.

product_updates.title: These AI notetaking devices can help you record and transcribe your meetings
product_updates.content: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings using AI. Some even offer live translation.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Widely used Trivy scanner compromised in ongoing supply-chain attack
technical_breakthroughs.content: Admins: Sorry to say, but it's likely a rotate-your-secrets kind of weekend.

technical_breakthroughs.title: OpenAI is throwing everything into building a fully automated researcher
technical_breakthroughs.content: OpenAI is refocusing its research efforts and throwing its resources into a new grand challenge. The San Francisco firm has set its sights on building what it calls an AI researcher, a fully automated agent-based system that will be able to go off and tackle large, complex problems by itself. ​​O…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Mind-altering substances are (still) falling short in clinical trials
technical_breakthroughs.content: This week I want to look at where we are with psychedelics, the mind-altering substances that have somehow made the leap from counterculture to major focus of clinical research. Compounds like psilocybin—which is found in magic mushrooms—are being explored for all sorts of health applications, in…
